label: Customer success replies
prompt:
customer names
ticket IDs
incident severity
SLA commitments
next update time
account owner names
product plan names
refund policy
stt_hints:
status update
escalation needed
closing note
handoff summary

snippet_entries.label: Status update
snippet_entries.expansion: Thanks for the update. We are reviewing this now and will send the next status by the agreed time.

snippet_entries.label: Escalation note
snippet_entries.expansion: Escalating this now and will return with the next update as soon as the owning team responds.

snippet_entries.label: Closing note
snippet_entries.expansion: Thanks again for the details. We are closing this now, but if anything changes you can reply here and we will reopen it.

snippet_entries.label: Handoff summary
snippet_entries.expansion: Handoff summary: current customer impact, latest findings, next update owner and communication deadline are captured here for the next responder.

curation.summary: Inbox-ready support follow-ups, escalation language and status updates for customer-facing work.

label: Sales follow-ups
prompt:
account names
pipeline stage
decision makers
procurement timing
renewal scope
security review
mutual action plan
contract terms
stt_hints:
demo follow up
next steps recap
pricing handoff
security review follow up

snippet_entries.label: Demo follow-up
snippet_entries.expansion: Thanks for the time today. Attached is the recap from the demo along with the open questions and next proposed steps.

snippet_entries.label: Next-step recap
snippet_entries.expansion: Next steps: confirm internal stakeholders, align on evaluation criteria and book the follow-up once the team has reviewed the material.

snippet_entries.label: Pricing handoff
snippet_entries.expansion: Sharing the pricing outline here so the team can review scope, rollout assumptions and commercial timing in one pass.

snippet_entries.label: Security review follow-up
snippet_entries.expansion: Following up on the security review items here so legal, security and the buyer team can close the remaining blockers without losing momentum.

curation.summary: Discovery recaps, demo follow-ups and next-step language for pipeline and deal work.

label: Founder ops notes
prompt:
company priorities
board updates
owner names
deadlines
financial terms
quarter goals
budget variance
hiring plan
stt_hints:
decision log
weekly update
action items
risk review

snippet_entries.label: Decision log
snippet_entries.expansion: Decision: move forward on this path. Owner: confirm rollout details and report back with risks, timeline and dependencies.

snippet_entries.label: Weekly update
snippet_entries.expansion: This week: progress is on track, key blockers are listed below and the next owner updates are due before the next operating review.

snippet_entries.label: Action items
snippet_entries.expansion: Action items: confirm owner, due date and success signal for each item before the meeting closes.

snippet_entries.label: Risk review
snippet_entries.expansion: Risk review: top risk, current exposure, mitigation owner and next checkpoint are captured here so follow-up does not drift.

curation.summary: Decision logs, weekly updates and action-item language for operating reviews and internal syncs.

label: Hiring pipeline
prompt:
candidate names
role titles
interview stages
hiring manager feedback
offer timing
levelling
salary band
start date
stt_hints:
interview debrief
candidate update
offer follow up
hiring manager recap

snippet_entries.label: Interview debrief
snippet_entries.expansion: Debrief summary: strengths, open concerns and recommended next step are captured here so the hiring team can decide quickly.

snippet_entries.label: Candidate update
snippet_entries.expansion: Thanks again for the conversation. We are aligning internally and will send the next update once the panel feedback is complete.

snippet_entries.label: Offer follow-up
snippet_entries.expansion: Following up on the offer details here. If anything feels unclear, reply with the questions and we will walk through them together.

snippet_entries.label: Hiring manager recap
snippet_entries.expansion: Hiring manager recap: panel signal, open concerns, timeline risk and recommended next step are summarized here for fast alignment.

curation.summary: Interview debriefs, candidate updates and hiring-manager coordination for recruiting workflows.

label: Product and engineering
prompt:
feature names
bug IDs
release scope
API names
platform constraints
service names
migration steps
infra constraints
stt_hints:
triage summary
release note
qa handoff
incident update

snippet_entries.label: Triage summary
snippet_entries.expansion: Triage summary: confirmed scope, current impact, likely owner and the next debugging step are listed below.

snippet_entries.label: Release note
snippet_entries.expansion: Release note: this change improves the main workflow, keeps the active limitations explicit and documents any rollout caveats.

snippet_entries.label: QA handoff
snippet_entries.expansion: QA handoff: please verify the main happy path, the known edge case and the regression check noted here before sign-off.

snippet_entries.label: Incident update
snippet_entries.expansion: Incident update: current impact, likely root cause, mitigation status and next checkpoint are captured here for the active response loop.

curation.summary: Triage, release and QA handoff language for product, engineering and debugging conversations.
